name: Orangesicle Pie
recipeIngredient: 6 oz packaged graham cracker crust (store bought)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. In a large bowl, combine sweetened condensed milk, egg yolks, orange juice, and rind; mix well.
3. Pour the mixture into the crust (the mixture will be thin).
4. Bake for 35 minutes or until a knife inserted near the center comes out clean.
5. Meanwhile, in a small mixing bowl, combine the remaining ingredients; beat until smooth and well blended.
6. When the pie is done, remove it briefly from the oven and spread the topping mixture on top.
7. Return the pie to the oven and bake for an additional 10 minutes.
8. Cool thoroughly before serving.
9. Chill any leftovers.
10. Enjoy your Great Summer Pie!
